name: Host Command Proxy
description: Proxy auth-heavy CLI commands from container to host machine through the cmd2host daemon. Bundled with operation templates for gh and AWS CLI; extensible to any other CLI whose normal usage is almost entirely auth-required (gcloud, az, ...) via project config. CLIs that mix local-only and auth-required subcommands (git) are out of the wrapper route's scope. v1.4 adds the cmd2host-proxy transparent dispatch binary so natural CLI invocations reach the host through the project's allowed operation templates.

commands.description: Comma-separated list of commands to proxy. Each entry becomes a /usr/local/bin/<command> symlink to cmd2host-proxy, which reverse-matches the user's argv against the project's allowed operation templates. Default 'gh' preserves existing setups; opt into 'gh,aws' (or any other auth-heavy CLI the project config declares operation templates for) when you want raw-argv transparent dispatch for additional CLIs. Do not include CLIs that mix local-only and auth-required subcommands (git) — local subcommands would be denied by the daemon.

installMcpServer.description: Install cmd2host-mcp (MCP server for AI agent integration)

connectionMode.description: Connection mode to host daemon: 'tcp' (default) or 'unix' (for --network none containers)
